choose.when: AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_person_id=p.person_id AND ba.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId})
AND (k.responsible_department_id=#{scope.departmentId} OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_person_id=p.person_id AND ba.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId}))
choose.otherwise: AND (EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM residence rs WHERE rs.person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(rs.region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(ba.applicant_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)))

choose.when: AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_person_id=p.person_id AND ba.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId})
AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_person_id=p.person_id AND ba.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId})
choose.otherwise: AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM residence rs WHERE rs.person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(rs.region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2))

mapper.sql: k.*,p.name person_name,p.id_card,p.phone,p.current_address,(SELECT rs.region_code FROM residence rs WHERE rs.person_id=p.person_id LIMIT 1) region_code
mapper.select: SELECT FROM key_population k JOIN person p ON p.person_id=k.person_id WHERE k.key_id=#{id}
SELECT FROM key_population k JOIN person p ON p.person_id=k.person_id WHERE k.key_id=#{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT current_status_code FROM person WHERE person_id=#{id}
SELECT p.current_status_code FROM person p WHERE p.person_id=#{id}

where.if: AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM residence rr WHERE rr.person_id=p.person_id AND rr.region_code LIKE CONCAT(#{region},'%'))

mapper.select: SELECT FROM key_population k JOIN person p ON p.person_id=k.person_id ORDER BY k.register_date DESC,k.key_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM key_population k JOIN person p ON p.person_id=k.person_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM key_population WHERE person_id=#{person} AND key_type=#{type} AND status='ACTIVE'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM key_population_application d JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=d.application_id WHERE d.person_id=#{person} AND d.population_type=#{type} AND d.operation_type='REGISTER' AND a.status IN('DRAFT','SUBMITTED','UNDER_REVIEW','APPROVED')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM key_population_application d JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=d.application_id WHERE d.record_id=#{record} AND d.operation_type='RELEASE' AND a.status IN('DRAFT','SUBMITTED','UNDER_REVIEW','APPROVED')
SELECT * FROM key_population_application WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE key_population_application SET business_status=#{to},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{id} AND business_status=#{from} AND version=#{version}
UPDATE key_population SET status='RELEASED',release_reason=#{reason},release_date=#{date},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE key_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' AND version=#{version}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM key_population_history WHERE record_id=#{recordId} ORDER BY occurred_at DESC,history_id DESC
